SEARCH
Package com.oop.referendumserver.services.dto

Class CheckLogin

java.lang.Object
com.oop.referendumserver.services.dto.CheckLogin
public class CheckLogin extends Object
DTO (Data Transfer Object) representing the result of a login check operation Contains either an AppUser object representing a successfully logged-in user or a LoginErrorEnum representing an error encountered during the login process

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructor
    Description

    Constructs a CheckLogin object with the provided AppUser.
    CheckLogin(LoginErrorEnum loginErrorEnum)
    Constructs a CheckLogin object with the provided LoginErrorEnum.
